bucket_roles.parser: grammar acceptance rejection and ambiguity coverage
bucket_roles.semantic: type system effect isolation ownership and behavior coverage
bucket_roles.lowering_abi: lowering runtime bridge and ABI boundary coverage
bucket_roles.module_roundtrip: interface emit import and metadata preservation coverage
bucket_roles.diagnostics: required diagnostic and fix-it behavior coverage
bucket_roles.examples: reader-facing example parity and tutorial-backed feature coverage
bucket_roles.spec_open_issues: known-spec-gap accounting and unresolved requirement tracking
bucket_roles.workpacks: historical planning shards retained for traceability only

gap_axes: example or tutorial path not covered
coverage_gap_model.claim_boundary: release-facing corpus claims must be traceable to checked-in manifests coverage-map families and deterministic executable evidence

claim_policy.sufficiency_rule: a coverage claim is only publishable when bucket minima family mapping and executable determinism gates all pass together
forbidden_claim_patterns: count-only coverage claims without family traceability
profile claims without strict-system or strict-concurrency deltas
release claims backed only by prose or dashboard summaries
claim_policy.fail_closed_model: any unresolved missing partial or known-open gap blocks release-claimable status for the affected profile or surface

priority_assignment_rules.p0-release-blocker: missing executable or traceability evidence for a release-claimable surface
priority_assignment_rules.p1-profile-blocker: strict strict-concurrency or strict-system deltas are missing or partial
priority_assignment_rules.p2-surface-gap: a required primary bucket or audited surface is only partially covered
priority_assignment_rules.p3-audit-gap: supplemental or historical coverage is missing but does not block current profile claims

retention_windows.profile-minimum-basis: retain indefinitely while the profile remains claimable
retention_windows.runtime-regression-basis: retain indefinitely once it closes a lowering or ABI regression
retention_windows.module-roundtrip-basis: retain until the interface and metadata format revs intentionally
retention_windows.example-adoption-basis: retain while the reader-facing tutorial or showcase path remains public

longitudinal_policy.eviction_rule: a retained suite can only be removed by replacing it with a stricter or broader successor that preserves the same traceability target
longitudinal_policy.reporting_expectation: longitudinal suites must remain visible as a distinct retained partition in generated coverage outputs
